parameters.name: get_crypto_price
parameters.description: Get current cryptocurrency price, 24h change, and market cap. Parameters: coin (name or ID like 'bitcoin', 'ethereum', 'solana'), currency (optional, target currency like 'eur', 'usd', default 'eur')

value.coin: ={{ $fromAI('coin', 'Cryptocurrency name or ID (e.g. bitcoin, ethereum, solana)', 'string') }}
value.currency: ={{ $fromAI('currency', 'Target currency (e.g. eur, usd). Optional, default eur', 'string') }}

schema.description: Cryptocurrency name or ID (e.g. bitcoin, ethereum, solana)
Target currency (e.g. eur, usd). Optional, default eur
